About Me

Designing with
clarity & purpose.

I'm a Senior UX Designer with over a decade of experience in the software and design industries, currently shaping enterprise-grade data automation products at Xceptor in Cape Town.

My work lives at the intersection of user research, scalable design systems, and complex product logic — particularly within capital markets and fintech environments where getting the details right matters enormously.

I expertly leverage AI-driven tools and workflows to accelerate design iteration, optimise user research analysis, and deliver cutting-edge, intelligent product solutions.

Enterprise UX

Translating configuration-heavy workflows and permission models into self-service tools that real users actually understand.

Evidence-Led Design

UX research artefacts that give product teams the confidence to make bold, data-backed decisions.

AI-Augmented Workflow

From Figma Make to Claude Co-work, I integrate AI tools throughout the design process to ship smarter and faster.

Cross-Functional Leadership

Acting as the bridge between product, engineering, QA, and executive stakeholders to keep design aligned with business goals.

Career

Experience.

A decade of design roles across fintech, gaming, animation, and global consumer brands.

Senior UX Designer 2023 – Present
Xceptor · Cape Town
  • Design clear and scalable user experiences for enterprise-grade data automation products within capital markets.
  • Collaborate with product, engineering, and QA teams to translate complex workflows into self-service tools, including configuration-heavy platforms and permission models.
  • Utilise UX research and design artefacts to lead teams toward confident, evidence-based product decisions.
  • Focus on modernising dashboards and AI-assisted workflows to ensure they remain robust and aligned with user needs.
Graphic Designer Level 2 2017 – 2023
Derivco · Durban
  • Managed end-to-end product lifecycle for high-profile clients including Betway, 32 Red, and Microgaming.
  • Conducted regular research on emerging UX trends to implement seamless, modern application flows.
  • Developed high-fidelity prototypes defining both functional logic and visual UI of application products.
  • Created specialised 3D assets to enhance the visual depth and quality of digital products.
Lead Graphic Designer 2015 – 2017
Durban Christian Centre · Durban
  • Directed end-to-end design process for seasonal marketing campaigns, from creative concept to final print production.
  • Introduced and managed Lean UX frameworks and workflow management systems to optimise team efficiency.
  • Served as the primary liaison between executive stakeholders and the design team.
Lead Graphic Designer 2012 – 2015
New Lacey's Promotions · Durban
  • Partnered with global brands including Disney, Mattel, and Marvel to design consumer products for the toy manufacturing industry.
  • Oversaw internal UX and content management for the corporate website.
  • Led the creative team in delivering social media content and print-ready designs for international retail.
Graphic Design Intern 2011
Immedia · Durban
  • Awarded a full-year bursary for a winning native iOS application design for a shipping port terminal.
  • Collaborated with senior designers on responsive web solutions and native mobile app development for iOS and Android.
Animation Intern 2010
Coffee Bean Studio · Durban
  • Focused on character creation and technical drawing for animation scenes.
  • Developed frame-by-frame sequences to support narrative flow and visual storytelling.
